author: Takahiro.N
description: Display notes from a Base as an Eisenhower matrix and drag cards to update their properties. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Takahiro.N
manifest.description: Display notes from a Base as an Eisenhower matrix and drag cards to update their properties.
manifest.name: Eisenhower Matrix for Bases

name: Eisenhower Matrix for Bases

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* chore(deps): bump the astro group across 1 directory with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/51
* chore(deps): bump sharp from 0.35.2 to 0.35.3 in /docs-site by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/52
* chore(deps): ランタイム/開発依存をまとめて更新（Dependabot #49/#50/#53/#54/#55 統合） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/101
* chore(deps): vitest 4 の JSX 設定を oxc へ追随し CHANGELOG を修正 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/102
* feat(ui): 設定ミス診断バナーと解決済み軸名の可視化を追加 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/107
* feat(ui): カードに読み取り専用の追加プロパティバッジを表示 (#104) by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/108
* feat(stagnation): 滞留インジケータ（mtime ヒューリスティック・F9）を追加 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/109
* feat(completion): カード上の完了トグル（boolean 完了プロパティ＋Bases 委譲） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/110
* chore(release): v0.2.0 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/111


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/compare/0.1.7...0.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* ci(actions): app-test で依存を導入し dependabot を整備 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/8
* chore(deps): bump actions/checkout from 5 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/1
* chore(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/2
* chore(deps): bump mermaid from 11.15.0 to 11.16.0 in /docs-site by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/6
* chore(deps-dev): bump typescript from 5.9.3 to 6.0.3 in /docs-site by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/3
* chore(deps): bump astro-mermaid from 2.0.2 to 2.1.0 in /docs-site by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/5
* chore(spike): Bases API 往復を実機自動検証し未決事項を確定 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/17
* feat(bases): F1 Bases カスタムビュー登録とアダプタ層を実装（#18） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/24
* feat(matrix): F2 象限算出と未分類ゾーンへの自前配置 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/25
* feat(matrix): F3 ドラッグ書き戻し（楽観更新＋ロールバック） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/26
* chore(deps-dev): bump prettier from 3.9.0 to 3.9.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/11
* chore(deps): bump sharp from 0.34.5 to 0.35.2 in /docs-site by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/15
* chore(deps-dev): bump esbuild from 0.24.2 to 0.28.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/10
* chore(deps): bump @dnd-kit/sortable from 8.0.0 to 10.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/13
* chore(deps-dev): typescript を 6.0.3 へ更新し baseUrl 非推奨を解消 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/27
* chore(deps-dev): eslint を 10.6.0 へ更新（jsx-a11y peer を override で緩和） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/28
* chore(deps): docs-site の astro を 7・starlight を 0.41 へ更新し sidebar 記法を修正 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/29
* fix(matrix): コードレビュー指摘の一括修正（楽観競合・DragOverlay・showUnclassified・a11y・読み取りガード） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/30
* fix(matrix): aria-live の誤報/再読み上げ修正と中核ロジックの単体テスト化（再レビュー指摘） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/31
* refactor(matrix): settle の通知判断を純関数 settleAnnouncement に抽出し回帰ガード by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/32
* fix(bases): 軸 absent を instanceof NullValue で判定し未分類への退避を是正 (Closes #33) by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/35
* feat(bases): F4 軸プロパティ設定（ハイブリッド＋書込ガード） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/36
* feat(ui): F5 カード操作（開く/新タブ/プレビュー/キーボード） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/37
* fix(bases): boolean 軸限定の型ガードで非 boolean 軸のデータ破壊を防ぐ by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/38
* feat(ui): F6 設定タブ（デフォルト軸・象限ラベル/色・欠損・i18n） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/39
* feat(undo): 直前1手の移動を元に戻す機能（コマンド＋トースト） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/40
* リリース前レビュー対応 + F5/F6/undo を develop へ（.base 除外・i18n 拡張・非 boolean ドラッグ保護） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/41
* 収束レビュー（多観点×5周）の対応: データ安全・i18n全面化・a11y・レスポンシブ・リリース準備 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/42
* fix(ui): ドラッグ中カードのオーバーレイがカーソルからずれる問題を修正 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/45
* fix(ui): ポップアウト別ウィンドウでカードを掴めるよう realm 堅牢 sensor を導入 (#44) by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/46
* fix(review): 収束レビュー（多観点×4巡）対応 — データ安全・a11y・設定ミス防御 by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/47
* test(e2e): 実機 Obsidian 1.12.7 で Bases 往復を自動検証（ハーネスを本実装へ移行） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/48
* chore(release): 0.1.0 初回リリース（Eisenhower Matrix v1） by @nakata5577 in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/56

## New Contributors
* @nakata5577 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/8
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nakaba-lab/eisenhower-bases-view/commits/0.1.0
